name: qianxin-fw-secgate3600
description: OctoBus package for QIANXIN SecGate3600 login, address group update, and logout APIs.

QIANXIN_FW_SecGate3600.QIANXIN_FW_SecGat.name: login
QIANXIN_FW_SecGate3600.QIANXIN_FW_SecGat.description: Login to SecGate3600 and cache token/cookie session state.

QIANXIN_FW_SecGate3600.QIANXIN_FW_SecGat.name: update-address-group
QIANXIN_FW_SecGate3600.QIANXIN_FW_SecGat.description: Replace SecGate3600 object address group configuration.

QIANXIN_FW_SecGate3600.QIANXIN_FW_SecGat.name: logout
QIANXIN_FW_SecGate3600.QIANXIN_FW_SecGat.description: Logout from SecGate3600 and clear cached session state.
